feat.name: Disarming Assault
feat.text: You attack with enough force to knock the weapon out of your foe's hands. Make a melee Strike; if you hit, you can attempt an Athletics check to Disarm that enemy.

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.

traits.name: Rage
traits.text: You must be raging to use abilities with the rage trait, and they end automatically when you stop raging.
